# Trippi

Trippi is an AI trip planner for group travel at https://www.trippi.lol/.

## Product

Trippi helps travelers plan collaborative trips with AI-powered itineraries, live maps, shared budgets, reservations, uploaded files, route planning, packing support, and travel memories.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://www.trippi.lol/
- Sitemap: https://www.trippi.lol/sitemap.xml

## Target Searches

- AI trip planner
- AI trip planner for group trips
- group trip planner
- collaborative travel itinerary app
- travel budget planner
- route planner for trips

## Indexing Notes

The public homepage is the primary marketing page. Login, dashboard, shared-token, OAuth, and private app routes should not be indexed.
